variations.caption: Sleep, upgraded lah. The Pod is now in Singapore — personalised cooling & heating for each side of the bed, so you and your partner both wake up recharged. Risk-free for 30 nights.

captionsByLocale.en-SG: Sleep, upgraded lah. The Pod is now in Singapore — personalised cooling & heating for each side of the bed, so you and your partner both wake up recharged. Risk-free for 30 nights.
captionsByLocale.zh-Hans-SG: 睡眠升级啦！Eight Sleep 智能床垫正式登陆新加坡——左右两侧独立冷暖调控，让你和另一半都一觉到天亮。30 晚无风险试睡，不爱可退。
captionsByLocale.ms-SG: Tidur, naik taraf lah. The Pod kini di Singapura — penyejuk & pemanas peribadi untuk setiap sisi katil, supaya anda dan pasangan bangun segar. Cuba bebas risiko 30 malam.
captionsByLocale.ta-SG: தூக்கம், இப்போது அப்கிரேட்! The Pod இப்போது சிங்கப்பூரில் — படுக்கையின் ஒவ்வொரு பக்கத்திற்கும் தனிப்பட்ட குளிரூட்டல் & வெப்பம். 30 இரவுகள் ரிஸ்க்-ஃப்ரீ முயற்சி.

variations.moodNote: Cinematic dual-tone bedroom calm, premium tech-wellness sanctuary glow

content.en-SG: Personalised cooling & heating for each side. Try The Pod risk-free for 30 nights.
content.zh-Hans-SG: 床的两侧独立控温,个性化冷暖。The Pod 30 晚无忧试睡。
content.ms-SG: Penyejuk & pemanas peribadi setiap sisi. Cuba The Pod tanpa risiko, 30 malam.
content.ta-SG: ஒவ்வொரு பக்கத்திற்கும் தனிப்பயன் குளிர் & வெப்பம். The Pod-ஐ 30 இரவுகள் இலவசமாக முயற்சி செய்.

input.prompt:
Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore — Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with personalized cooling and heating for each side of the bed. The Pod reduces snoring, tracks your sleep, and works with any mattress. Try it risk-free for 30 nights.
Hero subject: Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore — Fall asleep faster and stay asleep longer with personalized cooling and heating for each side of the bed. The Pod reduces snoring, tracks your sleep, and works with any mattress. Try it risk-free for 30 nights. (reference vibe: Eight Sleep | Now in Singapore).
Mood: cinematic.
Compose this image so it remains readable when cropped to any of these aspect ratios: 1:1, 4:5, 9:16, 16:9. The hero subject must stay centered and uncropped in every one.
Reserve the following regions as soft negative space — flat tone, low detail, no clutter — so editable text overlays can be placed there separately:
- the upper-center region (90% × 18%) for the headline.
- the lower-center region (90% × 17%) for the caption.
Primary subject anchor: the central 64% × 64% region of the frame; this region must survive every crop.
Do not render any text, logos, or watermarks in the image; all copy will be added as a separate editable overlay.
